$comment: Phase 6 (TODO-07) Sprint-1 agent briefs. Maps each committed Sprint-1 story to the implementing agent(s) per the AGREED CONTRACTS roster, with the context sources and gate each agent must honor. Feeds Phase 7 agent-task routing (TODO-08). No GitHub calls. Source: sprint_1_backlog.md, AGREED CONTRACTS in _common_context.md.
sprint_goal: Stand up a deployable, authenticated, tenant-isolated ingestion-and-routing thin slice (upload -> TOC -> chunk -> embed -> store -> route) on CI-gated, health-checked services with DPDP x-pii data-access in place from day one.
context_budget_note: Every Phase B+ agent prompt MUST carry 'Context Budget: {N} tokens | Sources: [...]' (ENFORCEMENT RULES). Budgets are assigned at Phase 7 routing; this brief lists the Sources each story requires.

briefs.title: PostgreSQL structure schema + migrations
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; migrations forward+rollback; tenant_id on every row

briefs.title: Auth: API keys + OAuth2/JWT + tenant substrate
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; API-key rotation + JWT validation; rate-limit on auth ops (ADV-003)

briefs.title: Qdrant collection + payload schema
sources: AGREED CONTRACT: backend <-> database-engineer payload filter
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; payload index on section_id + tenant_id

briefs.title: Service skeleton: Docker + /health + /ready
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; /ready returns 503 on dependency-down

briefs.title: CI: lint + type + unit + SAST + secrets scan
briefs.gate: CI blocks on hardcoded key; Python+TS stacks configured

briefs.title: PDF upload + extraction (POST /v1/documents)
sources: AGREED CONTRACT: backend <-> data-engineer ingest handoff
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; idempotent on content hash; IngestResponse shape

briefs.title: Native TOC extraction (Scenario A)
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; level/title/page-range from get_toc()

briefs.title: Embedding + idempotent upsert pipeline
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; idempotent on content hash; key via env only

briefs.title: Section-aware 3-level chunking
sources: AGREED CONTRACT: no chunk crosses a section boundary
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; deterministic golden fixtures (P0-risk)

briefs.title: LangGraph router node (Claude 3 Haiku)
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; golden TOC fixtures; RouterOutput contract validation + deterministic fallback (P0-risk); routing_time_ms in [100,300]

briefs.title: DPDP access + x-pii inventory (FR-029)
briefs.gate: unit tests pass; DataAccessExport.pii_fields[] enumerates x-pii fields
